highlights.text: I wrote Tuesday at 4pm: “I am still holding my 10% long runner from the Failed Breakdown last Monday November 25th - which I have updated here daily, and we have yet to have a dip large enough to trail it out” I also wrote on Tuesday that ES was bull flagging yet again, for another push higher, stating: “There is nothing to do but let runners work until a pullback hits.
ES is flagging again 6066 to 6035-38 (with 6050 a key mid-pivot).

post_title: Parabolic: 13 Days In A Row of Higher Highs For SPX. Pullback Time? Dec 6th Plan
